message:
feat(e2e): Add deployment tests and expand Playwright test coverage

- tests/e2e_deploy.rs: New deployment E2E test suite
- tests/e2e/encryption/password-flow.spec.ts: Password flow test updates
- tests/e2e/interactivity/search.spec.ts: Search interactivity test updates
- tests/e2e/reporters/jsonl-reporter.ts: JSONL reporter improvements
- tests/e2e_search_index.rs: Search index test expansions
